nodes.name: Extract Input
nodes.description:
Validates filename + base64 payload,
sets mimeType default

nodes.name: Register Document
nodes.description:
SHA-256 dedup check + SQLite registration.
Extracts text from PDF/DOCX/XLSX.
doc-server :3001

nodes.name: Is Duplicate?
nodes.description:
Already indexed? → respond immediately.
New file? → continue to embedding.

nodes.name: Respond Duplicate
nodes.description:
Returns {duplicate: true, id}
File was already indexed.

nodes.name: Respond Processing
Chunk and Embed
nodes.description:
Splits text into 500-char chunks
(50-char overlap, max 200 chunks).
Embeds each with nomic-embed-text-v2-moe.

nodes.name: Create Qdrant Collection
nodes.description:
Ensures rag_docs collection exists
(768-dim, Cosine distance).
Qdrant :6333

nodes.name: Check Has Points
nodes.description:
Validates embedding results.
Skips insert for docs with no
extractable text.

nodes.name: Insert Qdrant Points
nodes.description:
Batch-inserts all embedding vectors
into Qdrant rag_docs collection
with doc_id + filename payload.

nodes.name: Update Status Ready
nodes.description:
Marks document as ready in SQLite.
Frontend polling will now show
the document in the list.
